creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #2)

Initially I didn't add the LICENSE, but "portlint -AC" complained that the following line was in the LICENSE section. So I think portlint is not fully aware of slave port syntax. I will remove it.

I'll look into the OPTIONS_SLAVE. I couldn't find any documentation on slave ports, nothing in the porters handbook. So, I tried to reverse engineer from apache22-event-mpm and php55-tiny. I'm not sure they are slave ports or varients.

I'll try to find a port that uses OPTIONS_SLAVE, to see how it's done.
